---
name: 🔒 Security Report
about: Template for detailing security issues. (Note: standard practice is email to security@cbms.in, but this template provides a backup framework).
title: "[SECURITY] "
labels: security
assignees: ''
---

> [!WARNING]
> If this is a critical security vulnerability, please email **security@cbms.in** directly rather than submitting a public GitHub issue.

**Vulnerability Detail**
A description of the vulnerability.

**Impact**
Detail the potential impact (e.g. SQL injection, remote code execution, cross-tenant data leak).

**Proof of Concept**
Provide detailed steps or test code to reproduce the issue.
